title: phaenixopus muralis
intro: Phaenixopus muralis, also known as the "wall flower," is a type of flowering plant in the Bignoniaceae family. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Africa, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Phaenixopus muralis include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues such as asthma, and providing relief from skin irritations and wounds. Phaenixopus muralis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional medicine to make poultices and ointments.
